subcodes.first_line: O thou confirmed soul! Thy compelling letter was received. Its contents were laden with inner mysteries, and therein was reflected thy humility and abashment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفس موید نامه بلیغ رسید مضمون مشحون از راز درون بود و آن خجلت و شرمساری در
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @acting according to the exigencies of the day; pragmatism, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @thankfulness; gratitude
